ddls:
CREATE TABLE "golf_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "total_holes" INTEGER /* Total number of holes in the course */,
  "grass_type" TEXT /* Type of grass on the course */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the golf course was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the golf course's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the golf course */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the golf course */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the golf course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course */,
  "hole_number" INTEGER /* Number of the hole */,
  "white_yards" INTEGER /* Distance in yards from the white tee box */,
  "yellow_yards" INTEGER /* Distance in yards from the yellow tee box */,
  "red_yards" INTEGER /* Distance in yards from the red tee box */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par for the hole */,
  "stroke_index" INTEGER /* Stroke index for the hole */,
  "hole_length" INTEGER /* Length of the hole in yards (general length) */,
  "green_size" TEXT /* Size of the green (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "water_hazards" INTEGER /* Indicates if the hole has water hazards */,
  "bunkers" INTEGER /* Number of bunkers on the hole */,
  "fairway_width" TEXT /* Width of the fairway (e.g., narrow, wide) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES golf_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tee_boxes" (
  "tee_box_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tee box */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hole */,
  "tee_box_name" TEXT /* Name of the tee box (e.g., White, Yellow, Red) */,
  "distance_yards" INTEGER /* Distance in yards from the tee box */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par for the hole from this tee box */,
  "stroke_index" INTEGER /* Stroke index for the hole from this tee box */,
  "tee_box_color" TEXT /* Color of the tee box (e.g., blue, gold) */,
  "tee_box_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the tee box (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "tee_box_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the tee box in feet */,
  "tee_box_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the tee box (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tee_box_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tee_boxes_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who completed the activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., mowing, fertilizing, irrigation) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES golf_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap of the player */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player (e.g., male, female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the player */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course */,
  "tee_box_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tee box */,
  "round_date" TEXT /* Date the round was played */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score for the round */,
  "round_time" TEXT /* Time the round started */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Time the player teed off */,
  "total_putts" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made during the round */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit during the round */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens hit in regulation during the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES golf_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tee_box_id FOREIGN KEY ("tee_box_id") REFERENCES tee_boxes ("tee_box_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hole_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole score */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hole */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the hole */,
  "putts" INTEGER /* Number of putts on the hole */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalty strokes on the hole */,
  "fairway_hit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fairway was hit */,
  "green_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the green was hit in regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hole_scores_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hole_scores_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the golf course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES golf_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score of the participant */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the participant in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, maintenance, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_scores, edit_maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player (if applicable) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
